calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Lawrence Brusco, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Teamsters Local 853, appears through counsel, Teague P. Paterson. Appearing with Respondent are: Michael Buffa and Daniel Harrington. Parties and witnesses previously sworn, testify in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
